title: Beyond-MC Expansion
description: everything u need in one modpack, with over 300 mods, this modpack is made to completely enhance your minecraft experience.
body:
# Beyond - MC Expansion
### usage notice:
- you are allowed to add mods, if u do any errors that occur will not be my fault
- you are allowed to use this modpack in videos if u give credits and a working download link
- you are allowed to freely use this modpack in servers
- i am not sure if even have to state this but you have full rights to download the modpack

**please check your keybinds for there might be some errors or conflicts**

## about mod

**Beyond - MC Expansion** is a thrilling adventure into the unknown, pushing the limits of Minecraft with a **massive collection** of mods that **enhance every aspect** of the game! Whether you’re battling through tough **RPG-style** dungeons, discovering **new biomes**, or exploring dimensions filled with secrets, this pack has something for everyone.

Get ready to embark on a journey where **magic**, adventure, and **epic bosses** await. Uncover hidden treasures, unlock powerful spells, and take on monsters in epic boss fights! This isn’t just Minecraft—**it’s the ultimate survival, RPG, and adventure experience.** 
With mods that **expand the world’s depth**, **upgrade your gameplay** with **immersive features**, enhanced visuals, and an all-new magic system that rewards patience and skill. Every corner of the world is ripe for exploration, from vast, **dynamic dimensions** to the smallest hidden secrets.

Will you rise to the challenge? Your adventure **Beyond MC** begins now.

## Features

- 300+ mods
- tons of new mobs
- new bosses
- overhauled vanilla structures
- the aether(a clickbait dimension brought to life)
- new combat mechanics via the **better combat mod**
- and much more

please do not update or change the version of any mods in the modpack asa it may corrupt the modpack or lead to errors

**_the modpack might not have most of the mods depending on how you convert the file into a zip us the link below to retain as much mods as possible_**

use this link to convert the modpack into a zip: [.mrpack to zip](https://tutorialy.net/mrpacktozip/) as far as ive tested this retains all of the mods in the modpack that are on modrinth

_join the discord for error reports_
